prompts.name: Cozy
prompts.text: Create a cozy atmosphere with warm visual comfort, soft details, inviting surroundings, and a calm personal feeling.

prompts.name: Peaceful
prompts.text: Create a peaceful atmosphere with gentle pacing, relaxed body language, soft environmental detail, and visual calm.

prompts.name: Romantic
prompts.text: Create a romantic atmosphere with soft lighting, gentle color harmony, intimate framing, and subtle emotional warmth.

prompts.name: Dreamlike
prompts.text: Create a dreamlike atmosphere with soft transitions, delicate lighting, slightly surreal beauty, and graceful visual flow.

prompts.name: Mysterious
prompts.text: Create a mysterious atmosphere with restrained contrast, subtle shadows, atmospheric depth, and a sense of hidden story.

prompts.name: Magical
prompts.text: Create a magical atmosphere with subtle glow, floating particles, elegant wonder, and believable fantasy detail.

prompts.name: Melancholic
prompts.text: Create a melancholic atmosphere with quiet emotion, muted colors, gentle stillness, and restrained sadness.

prompts.name: Energetic
prompts.text: Create an energetic atmosphere with dynamic composition, vivid details, lively body language, and strong visual momentum.

prompts.name: Luxury
prompts.text: Create a luxurious atmosphere with refined styling, premium materials, elegant lighting, and polished visual presentation.

prompts.name: Wholesome
prompts.text: Create a wholesome atmosphere with warmth, kindness, soft expression, gentle surroundings, and approachable charm.

prompts.name: Dark Fantasy
prompts.text: Create a dark fantasy atmosphere with rich shadows, ornate details, dramatic mood, and grounded mystical elements.

prompts.name: Slice of Life
prompts.text: Create a natural slice-of-life atmosphere with everyday realism, relaxed details, believable setting, and candid charm.

prompts.name: Epic
prompts.text: Create an epic atmosphere with grand scale, strong visual presence, dramatic depth, and a sense of importance.

prompts.name: Serene
prompts.text: Create a serene atmosphere with quiet balance, soft colors, graceful composition, and a sense of inner stillness.

prompts.name: Playful
prompts.text: Create a playful atmosphere with lively expression, charming details, light energy, and cheerful visual personality.
